Comment.value: This script is called from the Duplicate scripts - Clone Page item - Clone List item etc
If old_tt_id is empty - it means that we duplicate the IO inside the title. In that case - suffix is used for renaming IO
If the whole Title is cloned we need to point to new Blocks, Modifiers, Lists, Links, Score Categories, IOs, Tags etc

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_io_id" ; $old_io_id )
Suffix is only needed when duplicating inside a Title
old_tt_id can be empty - when duplicated inside a Title.

Calculation.Text: TruncateText ( FAT IO::Name & Case ( IsEmpty($suffix); "" ; " " & $suffix) ; 26 ) // with "..." = 29 characters

Comment.value: Connect to new Object group if any

Calculation.Text: $isClonedTitle And Not IsEmpty ( FAT IO::Object Group)

Comment.value: If cloning a Package group - a new object group is created
Set a valid object name - no duplicates allowed in same title, not exceeding number of characters

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT IO::Name ) ) & SetProperty ( "new_name" ; $new_name ) & SetProperty ( "max_characters" ; 32 )

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id )

Comment.value: If there are fields connected - clone fields

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id )

Comment.value: Clone field will not change found set in FAT IO TO

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "old_item_id" ; $old_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_item_id" ; $new_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_type" ; "io") & SetProperty ( "hasFields" ; IO Type::IO has fields)

Comment.value: Clone text variable will not change found set in FAT IO TO
A source data IO is used when we use an IO to select from a selection.

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( FAT IO::Source data IO ) //and something that makes it impossible to call recursive two times

Comment.value: Search for IO in oldPrimary if it is created earlier in clone process

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix) & SetProperty ( "old_io_id" ; $old_source_data_io_id)

Comment.value: Go back to where we were in FAT IO
If there are corresponding texts to the io (i.e. rate) create textfields

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; $source_table ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT IO::Text 1 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

SetProperty ( "location_id" ; $new_io_id ) & SetProperty ( "source_table" ; $source_table ) & SetProperty ( "source_textfield" ; GetFieldName ( FAT IO::Text 2 id ) ) & SetProperty ( "caller_layout" ; Get(layoutName )) & SetProperty ( "learningprogramme_id" ; $title_id)

Comment.value: List cloning
Add cloneSettings include Lists
Point to the new List created earlier

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_list_id" ; $old_list_id )

Comment.value: Go back to IO if Clone List calls Clone IO
IO List cloning

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( FAT IO::IO List id)

Comment.value: Point to the new List created earlier

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "object_group_id" ; $object_group_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_tt_id" ; $old_tt_id ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_list_id" ; $old_io_list_id )

Comment.value: Go back to IO if Clone List calls Clone IO
